name: 05a — Client Q&A — Detect and Draft Reply (F-02)

parameters.query: SELECT value_json FROM project_memory WHERE key = 'client_channel_last_msg_id' LIMIT 1
INSERT INTO project_memory (key, value_json) VALUES ('client_channel_last_msg_id', $1::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value_json = EXCLUDED.value_json, updated_at = now()
SELECT id FROM drafts WHERE type = 'qa_reply' AND status = 'pending' AND (content_json->>'question_message_id') = $1 LIMIT 1
SELECT value_json FROM project_memory WHERE key = 'project_picture' LIMIT 1

nodes.name: Branch A — Post Draft via Approval Gate
nodes.notes: Replace WORKFLOW_02_ID with the actual n8n ID of workflow 02 after import.

parameters.url: =https://api.clockify.me/api/v1/workspaces/{{ $env.CLOCKIFY_WORKSPACE_ID }}/time-off/requests?status=APPROVED&start={{ $node['Branch B — List Candidate Teammates'].json.today_iso }}&end={{ $node['Branch B — List Candidate Teammates'].json.today_iso }}

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timeMin: new Date().toISOString(), timeMax: new Date(new Date().setHours(23,59,59,999)).toISOString(), items: $node['Branch B — List Candidate Teammates'].json.candidate_calendar_id ? [{ id: $node['Branch B — List Candidate Teammates'].json.candidate_calendar_id }] : [] }) }}

nodes.name: Branch B — Check Google Calendar Freebusy
Branch B — Apply Calendar OOO Check

parameters.query: SELECT discord_id FROM mute_list WHERE discord_id = $1

nodes.name: Branch B3 — Open DM to Teammate

body.content: =Hi — the client asked: '{{ $node['Branch B — Contact Decision'].json.question_text }}'. Do you have a project-level answer I can include in the reply? Please respond here within 2 hours if you can help. (This is a one-time ask — no follow-up if you don't respond.)

parameters.query: INSERT INTO project_memory (key, value_json) VALUES ($1, $2::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value_json = EXCLUDED.value_json, updated_at = now()

additionalFields.queryReplacement: ={{ 'qa_waiting_' + $node['Branch B — Contact Decision'].json.message_id }},={{ JSON.stringify({ question_message_id: $node['Branch B — Contact Decision'].json.message_id, question_text: $node['Branch B — Contact Decision'].json.question_text, teammate_discord_id: $node['Branch B — Contact Decision'].json.candidate_discord_id, dm_channel_id: $node['Branch B3 — Open DM to Teammate'].json.id, waiting_since: new Date().toISOString(), client_channel_id: $node['Branch B — Contact Decision'].json.client_channel_id, team_lead_channel_id: $node['Branch B — Contact Decision'].json.team_lead_channel_id, team_lead_discord_id: $node['Branch B — Contact Decision'].json.team_lead_discord_id, roster_names: $node['Branch B — Contact Decision'].json.roster_names }) }}

nodes.name: Branch B4 — Build Holding Response Prompt
Branch B4 — Post Holding via Approval Gate
nodes.notes: Replace WORKFLOW_02_ID with the actual n8n ID of workflow 02 after import.
